reasons: Angela can support Lapu-Lapu's dive timing with shield and healing.
Lapu-Lapu can stay longer in the enemy backline when Angela attaches during his commit window.

proof.summary: Lapu-Lapu commits into the fight, while Angela increases his survivability during the most dangerous part of the dive.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches as Lapu-Lapu enters the real fight.
Lapu-Lapu targets enemy damage dealers, not only the frontline.
failureCases: Lapu-Lapu dives before Angela is ready.
The enemy disengages and wastes Angela's timing.
Lapu-Lapu is controlled before using his main combo.

reasons: Floryn's global heal can support Lapu-Lapu when he dives deeper than normal support range.
Lapu-Lapu benefits from recovery during extended backline or objective fights.

proof.summary: Lapu-Lapu dives into extended fights, while Floryn adds map-wide recovery during his commit window.
worksBestWhen: Lapu-Lapu commits while Bloom is available.
Floryn times healing after enemy burst starts.
failureCases: Lapu-Lapu is instantly bursted before the heal.
Lapu-Lapu dives after Floryn's ultimate is already used.

reasons: Tigreal can group enemies so Lapu-Lapu can enter with a stronger multi-target fight angle.
Lapu-Lapu can follow Tigreal's control window with fighter dive and area pressure.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls the enemy formation, while Lapu-Lapu follows with fighter dive and area pressure.
worksBestWhen: Lapu-Lapu waits for Tigreal's crowd-control window.
The team fights around jungle corridors or objectives.
failureCases: The enemy saves disengage after Lapu-Lapu commits.

reasons: Minotaur can start or stabilize teamfights, giving Lapu-Lapu a safer entry point.
Lapu-Lapu can follow after Minotaur absorbs pressure or disrupts enemies.

proof.summary: Minotaur adds frontline control and healing, while Lapu-Lapu follows into the disrupted enemies.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur engages first or absorbs the first enemy cooldowns.
Lapu-Lapu enters after enemy control tools are used.
failureCases: Lapu-Lapu dives before Minotaur can help.
The fight spreads too wide for both heroes to layer pressure.

reasons: Rafaela's movement speed and healing help Lapu-Lapu reach fights, chase after engage, or disengage after his combo.
Lapu-Lapu can use Rafaela's support to enter priority targets more reliably.

proof.summary: Lapu-Lapu benefits from movement and healing support, while Rafaela helps him enter and exit fights more reliably.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela supports Lapu-Lapu before he commits.
Lapu-Lapu uses the speed window to reach priority targets.
failureCases: Lapu-Lapu dives out of Rafaela's range.
The enemy locks him during the engage.
Rafaela is forced to peel for the backline instead.
